_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform system administration on specialized cyber defense applications and systems (e.g., anti-virus, audit and remediation) or Virtual Private Network (VPN) devices, to include installation, configuration, maintenance, backup and restoration.
reference_document_element_description: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.499), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.490).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.546). Shared vocabulary: [systems]. DCWF-only terms [administration, anti, applications, audit, backup, configuration] vs WIDAI-only terms [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, infrastructure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.860, R=0.891). R exceeds P by 0.032 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 29 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (96.2%). The model interprets "Perform system administration on specialized cyber defense applications and syst" as logically implying aspects of "Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including c" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.505 ≈ STS 0.546 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [systems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.7%. Shared tokens: [systems]. DCWF-only: [administration, anti, applications, audit, backup, configuration]. WIDAI-only: [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, infrastructure].
